model_notes: National-team qualifier starts/minutes are the strongest signal when available.
Club starts/minutes support the model but do not override country role evidence.
Roster status, data confidence, captain signals, senior caps, and position depth adjust the final estimate.
Position depth prevents backup goalkeepers or deep bench players from receiving starter probabilities only because of club minutes.
This is a prototype role model, not an official lineup prediction.
